# Sarah's Working Notebook — ACME Corporate Strategy

Working vault for [[Sarah Chen]] on the [Corporate Strategy & FP&A](./people/sarah-chen.md) team at ACME Incorporated. Mix of daily notes, company analyses, meeting captures, and decision traces. Most of this is rough — the polished outputs live in [memos/](./memos/).

The unit of thought here is a single atomic note. If a note grows past ~400 words and starts to sprout subsections, that usually means it's two notes pretending to be one — split it.

## Map of content

- [Daily notes](./daily-notes/) — scratchpad, what got worked on each day
- [Companies](./companies/) — competitive landscape + M&A targets
  - [ACME Corp (internal)](./companies/acme-corp.md) — the home org, for cross-referencing
  - [BetaWidgets Inc](./companies/betawidgets-inc.md) — primary competitor
- [People](./people/) — atomic notes per person, internal and external
- [Meetings](./meetings/) — captured discussions
- [Decisions](./decisions/) — what we decided, when, and why
- [Methodology](./methodology/) — how we model things ([DCF framework](./methodology/dcf-framework.md))
- [External](./external/) — research reports, filings, third-party docs we don't own
- [Memos](./memos/) — final-form deliverables (IC memos, board decks)

## Open questions

- [ ] Is the [BetaWidgets margin compression](./companies/betawidgets-inc.md#margin-trend) durable or one-time?
- [ ] Resolve channel-check disagreement between [[Dana Liu]] and [[Tariq Osei]] — see [2026-05-07 portfolio review](./meetings/2026-05-07-portfolio-review.md)
- [ ] Finalize comparable set before [[2026-Q2-IC]] — currently [draft list](./decisions/2026-q2-thesis-call.md#comparable-set)

## Conventions

- Lowercase, terse, first-person. Don't worry about prose.
- `[[wikilink]]` for atomic-note refs (visual cue, not parsed by graph yet — that's fine)
- Standard `[text](path.md)` markdown for actual cross-doc links the graph picks up
- `#hashtag` inline tags for topics
- Date format everywhere: `YYYY-MM-DD`
- See [methodology/dcf-framework.md](./methodology/dcf-framework.md) for valuation conventions

> [!note] this vault is the source of truth for the [Q2 IC thesis call](./decisions/2026-q2-thesis-call.md). don't edit memos directly — edit notes, then export.
